mapper.select: SELECT BC.ID AS BOOK_CASE_ID, CC.CODE_NAME AS LOCATION_NAME, BCT.CODE AS BOOK_CASE_TYPE_CODE, BCOR.BOOK_OWNER_ID AS BOOK_OWNER_ID, U.NAME AS BOOK_OWNER_NAME, COUNT(BSR.ID) AS SOLD_COUNT, NVL(SUM(BSR.SOLD_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_SALES_AMOUNT FROM BOOK_CASE BC JOIN COMMON_CODE CC ON CC.GROUP_CODE = BC.GROUP_CODE_ID AND CC.CODE = BC.COMMON_CODE_ID JOIN BOOK_CASE_TYPE BCT ON BC.BOOK_CASE_TYPE_ID = BCT.ID LEFT JOIN BOOK_CASE_OCCUPIED_RECORD BCOR ON BCOR.BOOK_CASE_ID = BC.ID AND BCOR.UN_OCCUPIED_AT IS NULL LEFT JOIN USERS U ON U.ID = BCOR.BOOK_OWNER_ID LEFT JOIN BOOK B ON B.BOOK_CASE_ID = BC.ID AND B.DELETED_AT IS NULL LEFT JOIN BOOK_SALE_RECORD BSR ON BSR.ID = B.ID AND TO_CHAR(BSR.SOLD_AT, 'YYYY-MM') = #{targetMonth} GROUP BY BC.ID, CC.CODE_NAME, BCT.CODE, BCOR.BOOK_OWNER_ID, U.NAME ORDER BY TOTAL_SALES_AMOUNT DESC

SELECT U.ID AS BOOK_OWNER_ID, U.NAME AS BOOK_OWNER_NAME, BOP.NICKNAME AS NICKNAME, NVL(FC.FOLLOWER_COUNT, 0) AS FOLLOWER_COUNT, NVL(SC.TOTAL_SALES_AMOUNT, 0) AS TOTAL_SALES_AMOUNT, NVL(SC.SOLD_COUNT, 0) AS SOLD_COUNT FROM USERS U JOIN BOOK_OWNER BO ON U.ID = BO.ID LEFT JOIN BOOK_OWNER_PROFILE BOP ON BO.ID = BOP.BOOK_OWNER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BOOK_OWNER_ID, COUNT(*) AS FOLLOWER_COUNT FROM FOLLOW GROUP BY BOOK_OWNER_ID ) FC ON BO.ID = FC.BOOK_OWNER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT B.BOOK_OWNER_ID, NVL(SUM(BSR.SOLD_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_SALES_AMOUNT, COUNT(BSR.ID) AS SOLD_COUNT FROM BOOK B JOIN BOOK_SALE_RECORD BSR ON BSR.ID = B.ID GROUP BY B.BOOK_OWNER_ID ) SC ON BO.ID = SC.BOOK_OWNER_ID WHERE U.DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY FOLLOWER_COUNT DESC, TOTAL_SALES_AMOUNT DESC

SELECT U.ID AS BOOK_OWNER_ID, U.NAME AS BOOK_OWNER_NAME, BOP.NICKNAME AS NICKNAME, NVL(FC.FOLLOWER_COUNT, 0) AS FOLLOWER_COUNT, NVL(SC.TOTAL_SALES_AMOUNT, 0) AS TOTAL_SALES_AMOUNT, NVL(SC.SOLD_COUNT, 0) AS SOLD_COUNT FROM USERS U JOIN BOOK_OWNER BO ON U.ID = BO.ID LEFT JOIN BOOK_OWNER_PROFILE BOP ON BO.ID = BOP.BOOK_OWNER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BOOK_OWNER_ID, COUNT(*) AS FOLLOWER_COUNT FROM FOLLOW GROUP BY BOOK_OWNER_ID ) FC ON BO.ID = FC.BOOK_OWNER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT B.BOOK_OWNER_ID, NVL(SUM(BSR.SOLD_PRICE), 0) AS TOTAL_SALES_AMOUNT, COUNT(BSR.ID) AS SOLD_COUNT FROM BOOK B JOIN BOOK_SALE_RECORD BSR ON BSR.ID = B.ID GROUP BY B.BOOK_OWNER_ID ) SC ON BO.ID = SC.BOOK_OWNER_ID WHERE U.DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY TOTAL_SALES_AMOUNT DESC, FOLLOWER_COUNT DESC

SELECT NVL(SUM(BSR.SOLD_PRICE), 0) AS totalSales, NVL(SUM(FLOOR(BSR.SOLD_PRICE * SR.OWNER_RATIO)), 0) AS ownerTotal, NVL(SUM(BSR.SOLD_PRICE), 0) - NVL(SUM(FLOOR(BSR.SOLD_PRICE * SR.OWNER_RATIO)), 0) AS operatingProfit, COUNT(BSR.ID) AS soldCount FROM BOOK_SALE_RECORD BSR JOIN SETTLEMENT_RATIO SR ON BSR.RATIO_ID = SR.ID WHERE BSR.SOLD_AT >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startDate} || ' 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND BSR.SOLD_AT < TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endDate} || ' 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + 1
